description: Project hooks for Flutter development workflow

hooks.prompt: Check if the edited file is a Cubit file (ends with _cubit.dart). If YES, respond with a systemMessage reminding to update or verify the corresponding test file. The test file should be at: test/features/<feature_name>/cubit/<cubit_name>_test.dart. If the test file doesn't exist, remind to create it. If NO (not a cubit file), return empty response. Input: $TOOL_INPUT
